title: Scene Outcome Contract
description: Output schema for scene dispatcher — defines the result returned after resolving an encounter

scene_id.description: Unique identifier for the resolved scene

encounter_type.description: Type of encounter that was resolved

outcome_code.description: Result code indicating how the encounter concluded

character_id.description: Identifier for the affected party member

hp_change.description: Net HP change for this character (negative = damage taken)

conditions.description: Conditions applied to this character (e.g., poisoned, unconscious)

casualties.description: List of party member state changes from the encounter

gold.description: Gold pieces gained from the encounter

loot.description: Items and gold gained from the encounter

time_spent.description: In-game time spent on this encounter in minutes

party_changes.description: Mutations to party-level state (e.g., morale, reputation)

campaign_changes.description: Mutations to campaign-level state (e.g., quest progress, world facts)

state_changes.description: Any mutations to party or campaign state resulting from the encounter
